name: Western Apache

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Western Apache (west2615).

notes: Skeleton. Southern Athabaskan (Apachean) language of Arizona written in the San Carlos practical orthography. Lateral obstruents (tł, tł', ł=[ɬ]), the affricate series ts/ts'/dz and ch/ch'/j, and ejectives written with a following apostrophe are mapped. Lexical high tone (marked with an acute accent in careful writing) and vowel nasalization are left unencoded, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Western Apache (west2615)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
